parameters.content:
## Validate and Deduplicate
Fail-fast before any side effects.
Skip if source_event_id already exists in automation_runs.

## Orchestrate
Opens audit run → executes sub-workflows in order → runs inline steps → closes audit run.
Sub-workflows receive accumulated state and return it plus their results.
Audit calls both go to SYS - Audit Service: CREATE_RUN at start, UPDATE_RUN at end.

parameters.errorMessage: =Validation failed for event {{ $json.state.event_id }}. Missing required fields.

nodes.name: Execute: SUB - Create Finish Material Sheet

parameters.jsonBody:
={ "raw": "{{ Buffer.from('To: ' + $json.state.client_email + '
Subject: Your ' + $json.state.project_type + ' Project Has Started
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8

Hi ' + $json.state.client_name.split(' ')[0] + ',

Thank you for signing your contract. Your project is officially underway!

Your project manager will be in touch shortly.

Warm regards,
The Team').toString('base64url') }}" }

={ "CustomerRef": { "value": "{{ $('Execute: SUB - Create Finish Material Sheet').first().json.qb.customer_id }}" }, "TxnDate": "{{ $('Execute: SUB - Create Finish Material Sheet').first().json.state.received_at.substring(0,10) }}", "DueDate": "{{ $('Execute: SUB - Create Finish Material Sheet').first().json.state.received_at.substring(0,10) }}", "EmailStatus": "NeedToSend", "BillEmail": { "Address": "{{ $('Execute: SUB - Create Finish Material Sheet').first().json.state.client_email }}" }, "Line": [{ "LineNum": 1, "DetailType": "SalesItemLineDetail", "Description": "{{ $('Execute: SUB - Create Finish Material Sheet').first().json.state.deposit_milestone }}", "Amount": {{ $('Execute: SUB - Create Finish Material Sheet').first().json.state.deposit_amount }}, "SalesItemLineDetail": { "Qty": 1, "UnitPrice": {{ $('Execute: SUB - Create Finish Material Sheet').first().json.state.deposit_amount }} } }] }

={ "values": [[ "{{ $('Execute: SUB - Create Finish Material Sheet').first().json.state.client_name }}", "{{ $('Execute: SUB - Create Finish Material Sheet').first().json.state.project_type }}", "{{ $('Execute: SUB - Create Finish Material Sheet').first().json.state.client_address.split(',')[1]?.trim() }}", "{{ $('Execute: SUB - Create Finish Material Sheet').first().json.qb.estimate_number }}", true, "Onboarding", {{ $('Execute: SUB - Create Finish Material Sheet').first().json.state.total_contract_value }} ]] }

assignments.name: results
state
assignments.value:
={{ {
  run_id:               'RUN-' + $json.slack_event_id,
  event_id:             $json.slack_event_id,
  received_at:          $json.received_at,
  slack_file_url:       $json.slack_file_url,
  slack_file_name:      $json.slack_file_name,
  client_name:          $json.client_name,
  client_email:         $json.client_email,
  client_phone:         $json.client_phone,
  client_address:       $json.client_address,
  project_type:         $json.project_type,
  milestones:           $json.milestones,
  finish_materials:     $json.finish_materials,
  folder_name:          $json.client_name + ' | ' + $json.client_address + ' | ' + $json.project_type,
  contract_pdf_name:    $json.client_name + ' - ' + $json.project_type + ' - Contract',
  fm_sheet_name:        $json.client_name + ' - ' + $json.project_type + ' - Finish Material List',
  total_contract_value: $json.milestones.reduce((sum, m) => sum + m.amount, 0),
  deposit_amount:       $json.milestones[0].amount,
  deposit_milestone:    $json.milestones[0].name
} }}

main.node: Execute: SUB - Create Finish Material Sheet
